name: eval spec schema: subject_target_hash must be sha256-prefixed hex (§2.4)
command: echo '{"name":"t","command":"echo hi","setup":[],"expect":{"exit_code":0},"subject_target_hash":"not-a-hash"}' > spec.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-eval-spec.sh" spec.json 2>&1 | grep -q "subject_target_hash" && echo ok >&2
